scope_summary.problem: JIT codegen never emits mb_retain/mb_release — all heap objects leak. GC disabled because no root registration. #1129
scope_summary.success_criteria: JIT-compiled code correctly retains/releases heap pointers. Compile-time constants use immortal refcount. GC re-enabled. All 149 conformance tests pass. ASan clean.

boundary.in_scope: rc.rs (immortal refcount), symbols.rs (register retain/release), jit.rs (emit retain/release at assignment/return), gc.rs (re-enable)
boundary.out_of_scope: Container internal refcounting (list_ops, dict_ops already handle element ownership), stack maps, conservative GC scanning
boundary.constraints: Must not break 149 conformance tests. Retain/release must be balanced — no double-free, no leak.
